# daytona_config (Data Source)

Reads Daytona server configuration visible to the configured credentials.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_config" "example" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `analytics_api_url` (String) Analytics API URL, when configured.
- `announcements_json` (String) Announcements configuration as JSON.
- `billing_api_url` (String) Billing API URL, when configured.
- `dashboard_url` (String) Daytona dashboard URL.
- `default_snapshot` (String) Default snapshot image.
- `environment` (String) Daytona environment name.
- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `linked_accounts_enabled` (Boolean) Whether linked accounts are enabled.
- `maintenance_mode` (Boolean) Whether Daytona is in maintenance mode.
- `max_auto_archive_interval` (Number) Maximum auto-archive interval.
- `oidc_json` (String) OIDC configuration as JSON.
- `posthog_json` (String) PostHog configuration as JSON.
- `proxy_template_url` (String) Proxy template URL.
- `proxy_toolbox_url` (String) Proxy toolbox URL.
- `pylon_app_id` (String) Pylon app ID, when configured.
- `rate_limit_json` (String) Rate-limit configuration as JSON.
- `ssh_gateway_command` (String) SSH gateway command, when configured.
- `ssh_gateway_public_key` (String) SSH gateway public key, when configured.
- `version` (String) Daytona server version.
